items.title: Photographer Spends 10 Years Documenting the Bloody War on Drugs
items.summary: A photographer has spent the best part of a decade documenting the War on Drugs -- looking at where cocaine comes from and where it ends up. [Read More]

items.title: Researchers Develop All-New Pixel Type That Can Both Record and Display Light
items.summary: Researchers at ETH Zurich have developed a novel type of pixel that can both capture images and display them. In the future, this new pixel could be utilized inside hybrid camera/display devices. [Rea…

items.title: Oberwerth’s Leather D-Lux 8 Case Keeps It Safe, But Always Ready
items.summary: Oberwerth has announced an "ever-ready" case for the Leica D-Lux 8. It perfectly fits over the camera to keep it padded and secure, but leaves access to the ports and quickly opens so important moment…
